tasks.prompt: Perform a weekly research sweep for new papers and developments regarding the "baby universe" theory in quantum cosmology. Check for new publications on arXiv (gr-qc, hep-th), focus on validity, sophistication, third quantization, and observational propositions. Compare findings against the baseline at 'outputs/baby-universe-quantum-cosmology-baseline.md'. Write a brief update report in Korean if any meaningful changes or highly relevant papers are found.

Perform a weekly research sweep for new papers and articles enhancing the sophistication and validity of the Many-Worlds Interpretation (MWI) and Hugh Everett's Relative State Formulation in quantum mechanics and quantum cosmology. Translate the new findings into Korean and append them as a new dated update section in outputs/many-worlds-validity-baseline.md. Focus on derivations of the Born rule, Wheeler-DeWitt equation applications, macroscopic superposition, and singularity resolution.
